mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_message (from_uid, to_uid, content, msg_type, image_url, send_time, is_read) VALUES (#{fromUid}, #{toUid}, #{content}, #{msgType}, #{imageUrl}, #{sendTime}, #{isRead})
mapper.select: SELECT msg_id, from_uid, to_uid, content, msg_type, image_url, send_time, is_read FROM chat_message WHERE (from_uid = #{fromUid} AND to_uid = #{toUid}) OR (from_uid = #{toUid} AND to_uid = #{fromUid}) ORDER BY send_time ASC, msg_id ASC

SELECT latest.peer_uid, COALESCE(u.username, CONCAT('用户', latest.peer_uid)) AS peer_name, u.avatar AS peer_avatar, m.msg_id AS last_msg_id, m.content AS last_content, m.msg_type AS last_msg_type, m.send_time AS last_send_time, COALESCE(unread.unread_count, 0) AS unread_count FROM ( SELECT peer_uid, MAX(msg_id) AS last_msg_id FROM ( SELECT to_uid AS peer_uid, msg_id FROM chat_message WHERE from_uid = #{uid} UNION ALL SELECT from_uid AS peer_uid, msg_id FROM chat_message WHERE to_uid = #{uid} ) conversation_source GROUP BY peer_uid ) latest INNER JOIN chat_message m ON m.msg_id = latest.last_msg_id LEFT JOIN `user` u ON u.user_id = latest.peer_uid LEFT JOIN ( SELECT from_uid AS peer_uid, COUNT(*) AS unread_count FROM chat_message WHERE to_uid = #{uid} AND is_read = 0 GROUP BY from_uid ) unread ON unread.peer_uid = latest.peer_uid ORDER BY m.send_time DESC, m.msg_id DESC
